code:
import io
import string

let s = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(s)
mut line_start = 0
mut found = false
mut result = ""
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  let at_end = i == n
  mut is_nl = false
  if not at_end
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 10
        is_nl = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  if at_end or is_nl
    if line_start < i
      let line = string.substring(s, line_start, i)
      let llen = string.len(line)
      mut j = llen
      mut has_content = false
      mut scanning = true
      while scanning
        if j == 0
          scanning = false
        else
          match string.byte_at(line, j - 1)
          when Some(b)
            if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10 or b == 11 or b == 12
              j = j - 1
            else
              has_content = true
              scanning = false
            end
          when None
            scanning = false
          end
        end
      end
      if has_content
        found = true
        result = line
      end
    end
    line_start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if found
  print("#{result}\n")
else
  print("(none)\n")
end
